'''nasomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oosperm|oosperm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oosperm|oosperm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nasomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:næsemeth|næsemeth]] || [[word:næsemej|næsemej]] || [[word:næsemesh|næsemesh]] || [[word:næseme|næseme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nasosomoth|nasosomoth]] || [[word:nasosomoj|nasosomoj]] || [[word:nasosomosh|nasosomosh]] || [[word:nasosomo|nasosomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nasomoth|nasomoth]] || [[word:nasomoj|nasomoj]] || [[word:nasomosh|nasomosh]] || [[word:nasomo|nasomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nasofmoth|nasofmoth]] || [[word:nasofmoj|nasofmoj]] || [[word:nasofmosh|nasofmosh]] || [[word:nasofmof|nasofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nasomotho|nasomotho]] || [[word:nasomojo|nasomojo]] || [[word:nasomosho|nasomosho]] || [[word:nasomoko|nasomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nasomoth|nasomoth]] || [[word:nasomoj|nasomoj]] || [[word:nasomosh|nasomosh]] || [[word:nasomo|nasomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nasomothol|nasomothol]] || [[word:nasomojol|nasomojol]] || [[word:nasomoshol|nasomoshol]] || [[word:nasomokol|nasomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nasomothotho|nasomothotho]] || [[word:nasomojojo|nasomojojo]] || [[word:nasomoshosho|nasomoshosho]] || [[word:nasomoko|nasomoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nasomothon|nasomothon]] || [[word:nasomojon|nasomojon]] || [[word:nasomoshon|nasomoshon]] || [[word:nasomokon|nasomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nasomothoro|nasomothoro]] || [[word:nasomojoro|nasomojoro]] || [[word:nasomoshoro|nasomoshoro]] || [[word:nasomokoro|nasomokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
